title: Iran says $270bn war loss must be compensated, as fresh talks with US loom
snippet: Iran government estimates total war losses at $270 billion (preliminary). Tehran's UN envoy demands reparations from US, Israel, and 5 Arab states (Bahrain, Saudi Arabia, Qatar, UAE, Jordan) for allowing attacks from their territory. Includes physical destruction and lost economic activity.
tag_reason: 이란의 $270B 전쟁 피해 추산 및 5개 아랍국가 대상 배상 요구는 4/15 신규. 이전 보도된 '전쟁 배상' 개념의 구체적 수치화.
